texto: Every lawyer shall tell his or her client that becoming involved with the legal system is like three years of experimental chemotherapy, one hundred percent guaranteed not to work.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lawrence Joseph: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a saude mental. O trecho “Every lawyer shall tell his or her client that becoming involved with the legal system is like th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que saude-mental, law, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e reflexao.

frase_original: Every lawyer shall tell his or her client that becoming involved with the legal system is like three years of experimental chemotherapy, one hundred percent guaranteed not to work.

texto: Every once in a while I don't think it's a bad idea for lawyers to remember that what goes on, at least on some level of our brains, is that we have to imagine everything coming apart. ... It's what we are. Out of control, always prepared, Boy Scout control freaks.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lawrence Joseph sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Every once in a while I don't think it's a bad idea for lawyers to remember that what goes on, at…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, law, control, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
